title: Pekit's Bows to Guns - Wild West
description: This pack turns the bow/crossbow into Wild West style weapons
body:
This pack turns the crossbow and bow into guns from the Wild West, like the Winchester 1873 and a sawn-off shotgun.
Comes with custom sound effects!


![Image of Bow and Crossbow Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03dd61cbc78973c0aa5f258241a181040ab90b02.png)



If you like this pack, you can follow me on:

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/PekitP)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pekitp/projects)

[PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pekitp/)
